full_text:
Liu Hu ŚäČŤôé
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Hu (ŚäČŤôé)was born in Shanyang. Sent to aid Huang Zu while he was being attacked by Sun Ce. Liu Hu was affiliated with Liu Biao. Liu Hu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
